headline: 2 Electronics Testing Stocks to Buy From a Prospering Industry
summary: The Zacks Electronics -Testing Equipment industry players, such as AME and FTV, are poised to benefit from the solid demand for testing instruments amid challenging macroeconomic conditions.

headline: Comcast Gears Up to Report Q2 Earnings: What's in the Cards?
summary: CMCSA heads into Q2 earnings with broadband, media and theme park pressures in focus as investors watch for signs of stabilization.

headline: Accruent Announces Strategic Partnership with PowerX to Strengthen Telecom Infrastructure Energy Management and Performance
summary: AUSTIN, Texas, July 21, 2026--Accruent, a leading provider of solutions to unify the built environment and an operating company of Fortive (NYSE: FTV), today announced a new strategic partnership with PowerX, a telecom infrastructure intelligence company helping operators monitor and manage energy and tower performance across distributed site portfolios.

headline: New Fluke TLPV2 Solar Test Lead Set Eliminates Risky Live-Box Voltage Measurements in Operating PV Systems
summary: New Y-style MC4 test leads enable safer operating voltage measurements on live PV systems without opening energized enclosures New Fluke TLPV2 Solar Test Lead Set Eliminates Risky Live-Box Voltage Measurements New Y-style MC4 test leads enable safer operating voltage measurements on live PV systems New Fluke TLPV2 Solar Test Lead Set Eliminates Risky Live-Box Voltage Measurements New Y-style MC4 test leads enable safer operating voltage measurements on live PV systems Everett, Washington, July 2
